creator: kai@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Wen Heping from comment #0)

Hi Wen,

thank you for patch. Unfortunately we cannot commit this yet until the Python default version is switched to 3.10+ in the FreeBSD ports tree.

This is because upstream has dropped support for Python 3.9 with the 16.0.0 release. Thus we've wait until bug #275494 is done.
